com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Interface FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeCurrentStepCallback, FullIntegrationBase.FatCurrentStepCallback
    Enclosing class:
    FullIntegrationBase

    public static interface FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback
    Callback for the one step of the whole procedure.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onFail(java.lang.String code, java.lang.String msg)
      It will not end the procedure but you need to retry this step.
      void onSuccess()
      Current step for the transaction succeeds.

    • Method Detail

      • onSuccess

        void onSuccess()
        Current step for the transaction succeeds.

      • onFail

        void onFail(java.lang.String code,
            java.lang.String msg)
        It will not end the procedure but you need to retry this step.
        Parameters:
        code - See ResultConstant
        msg - fail message.
